sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39502" key="e)piqusia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-θῠσιάω</orth>, <sense id="n39502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offer incense</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">120</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
